constraints.description: A positive capital-gain value is consistent with a deliberate attempt to appear higher-income (gain-targeted).
A positive capital-loss value is consistent with a deliberate attempt to appear higher-income (gain-targeted).
An hours-per-week value in the full-time or overtime range (40-99) is consistent with a deliberate attempt to appear higher-income (gain-targeted).
An education level of Bachelors or higher is consistent with a deliberate attempt to appear higher-income (gain-targeted).
A numeric education level of 13 or higher is consistent with a deliberate attempt to appear higher-income (gain-targeted).
An occupation of Exec-managerial or Prof-specialty is consistent with a deliberate attempt to appear higher-income (gain-targeted).
A workclass of Self-emp-inc is consistent with a deliberate attempt to appear higher-income (gain-targeted).
A marital-status of Married-civ-spouse is consistent with a deliberate attempt to appear higher-income (gain-targeted).
An inconsistency between the education and education-num fields suggests a deliberate, incomplete edit to inflate qualifications (gain-targeted).
A race value of 'White' on a flagged cell suggests a deliberate change to mask a sensitive attribute (fairness-masking).
A sex value of 'Male' on a flagged cell suggests a deliberate change to mask a sensitive attribute (fairness-masking).
A relationship of 'Husband' with a non-'Male' sex value suggests the sex field was deliberately altered to mask gender (fairness-masking).
A relationship of 'Wife' with a non-'Female' sex value suggests the sex field was deliberately altered to mask gender (fairness-masking).
A workclass value of '?' on a flagged cell suggests a deliberate choice to hide the true value (obfuscation).
An occupation value of '?' on a flagged cell suggests a deliberate choice to hide the true value (obfuscation).
A native-country value of '?' on a flagged cell suggests a deliberate choice to hide the true value (obfuscation).
An age outside the plausible human range [17, 90] serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A negative capital-gain is physically impossible and serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A negative capital-loss is physically impossible and serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
An hours-per-week value outside the plausible range [1, 99] serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
An education-num outside the valid range [1, 16] serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A non-positive fnlwgt value is invalid and serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A workclass value that is not a recognized category or the '?' placeholder serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
An occupation value that is not a recognized category or the '?' placeholder serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A marital-status value that is not a recognized category serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A native-country value that is not a recognized category or the '?' placeholder serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
An education value that is not a recognized category serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A relationship value that is not a recognized category serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A race value that is not a recognized category serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A sex value that is not a recognized category serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A class value that is not a recognized category serves no manipulation goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
